# Buildkite Skills for AI Agents
# https://github.com/buildkite/skills

> Buildkite is a CI/CD platform for fast, flexible software delivery.
> These skills teach AI coding agents to configure Buildkite correctly.

## Skills

### buildkite-pipelines
Path: skills/buildkite-pipelines/SKILL.md
Topics: pipeline.yml, step types (command, wait, block, trigger, group), plugins, dynamic pipelines, artifacts, hooks, retry, concurrency, matrix builds

### buildkite-agent
Path: skills/buildkite-agent/SKILL.md
Topics: agent installation, buildkite-agent.cfg, tags, queue routing, clusters, agent tokens, hosted agents, SSH keys, git mirrors, agent lifecycle hooks

### buildkite-cli
Path: skills/buildkite-cli/SKILL.md
Topics: bk build create/list/view, bk job log/retry/cancel, bk pipeline, bk secret, bk artifact, bk auth login

### buildkite-platform
Path: skills/buildkite-platform/SKILL.md
Topics: REST API, GraphQL API, webhooks, Test Engine, Packages registry, OIDC, SSO/SAML, notification services

## Full Documentation
https://buildkite.com/docs
